description: A local-first RAG engine for web archival and semantic search. Crawl, embed, and query your own knowledge base entirely offline.
MemVector: Local Vector API, Storage & Embedding Engine for PHP

Agent Fusion is a local RAG semantic search engine that gives AI agents instant access to your code, documentation (Markdown, Word, PDF). Query    your codebase from code agents without hallucinations. Runs 100% locally, includes a lightweight embedding model, and optional multi-agent task    orchestration. Deploy with a single JAR
Lightweight RAG pipeline using SentenceTransformers, FAISS, and Ollama. Processes PDFs into vector embeddings and retrieves context to generate accurate answers locally.
A local sandbox for experimenting with LangChain vector storage, embeddings, FAISS indexing, and similarity-based retrieval.
An end-to-end local RAG system demonstrating document ingestion, recursive chunking, embedding generation, and semantic retrieval.
Local prototype using hybrid search and multi-modal embeddings to retrieve text/images from PDFs on ~4GB GPUs.
Local RAG system over Obsidian notes using Python, embeddings, and source-grounded answers.
